ComponentAsset.title: ComponentAsset

ComponentAssetKind.description:
The base-closure asset kinds a complete capsule declares.

A capsule ships a bundled CPython runtime, the locked A2A distribution, a
bundled Node.js runtime, and the pinned ACP adapter. The pinned versions are
:data:`CPYTHON_VERSION_PIN`, :data:`NODEJS_VERSION_PIN`, and
:data:`ACP_VERSION_PIN`.
ComponentAssetKind.title: ComponentAssetKind

ComponentCompatibility.description: Protocol and schema compatibility facts a consumer must honour.

api_versions.description: Gateway API version range served by this generation.

migration_range.description: Alembic base/head revision range packaged in this generation.

ComponentCompatibility.title: ComponentCompatibility

ComponentEntrypoint.description: A single typed launch surface, invoked relative to the capsule root.

kind.description: The launch surface this entry names.

console_script.description: Console-script name declared by the distribution.

relative_command.description: Argv path segments relative to the capsule root.
relative_command.title: Relative Command

EntrypointKind.description:
The two launch surfaces the contract declares.

``gateway`` is the dashboard-owned desktop gateway launch. ``standalone_mcp``
is the caller-owned ``vaultspec-mcp`` adapter, which the desktop lifecycle
never launches or adopts.
EntrypointKind.title: EntrypointKind

MigrationRange.description: The Alembic revision range the generation's package migrations cover.
MigrationRange.title: MigrationRange

TargetTriple.description:
The five accepted desktop capsule targets, as Rust-style triples.

The triples match the platform vocabulary already used by the locked
dependency closure (see ``desktop_tests/test_dependency_closure.py``).
TargetTriple.title: TargetTriple

description:
The versioned desktop component manifest consumed by dashboard packaging.

The manifest is the entire boundary the dashboard reads about an A2A
generation. It is deterministic and self-describing: given the same inputs
the emitter produces a byte-identical document, so a release-set receipt can
pin a generation by manifest digest.

contract_version.description: Manifest grammar version; consumers check major equality.
contract_version.title: Contract Version

compatibility.description: Served API range and packaged Alembic migration range.

entrypoints.description: Gateway and standalone MCP launch surfaces.

digest_algorithm.description: Algorithm governing every digest in this manifest.

assets.description: Base-closure assets with pinned versions, licenses, digests.
assets.title: Assets

dependency_lock.description: Digests pinning the Python and JavaScript dependency graphs.

title: ComponentManifest
